headline: RBI's Monetary Policy Committee cuts repo rate 50 bps to 5.00% in surprise off-cycle move
body_text: The Reserve Bank of India's Monetary Policy Committee lowered the policy repo rate by 50 basis points to 5.00% on Wednesday, an off-cycle decision passed 5-1. The MPC cited a faster-than-expected decline in headline CPI to 2.9% in May. The stance was kept at neutral.
